product_overview: A single-page personal portfolio that showcases projects and certifications, and lets visitors contact the portfolio owner. The experience is centered on scrolling through sections and interacting with project and certification cards.
core_goals: Browse the portfolio content from a single page
Review showcased projects and open source links
Inspect certifications and available credential links
Send a message to the portfolio owner through the contact form

features.name: View Projects
features.description: Browse the project showcase and access related code or demo links.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to Projects section -> Hover over a project card -> Click View Code link -> Open the project repository
Navigate to / -> Scroll to Projects section -> Hover over a project card -> Click Live Demo link -> Open the project demo

features.name: View Certifications
features.description: Browse certifications and open available credential links.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to Certifications section -> Hover over a certification card -> Click View Credential link if available -> Open the credential page

features.name: Submit Contact Form
features.description: Send a message to the portfolio owner using the contact form.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Fill in name -> Fill in email -> Fill in message -> Submit the contact form -> See success message "✓ Message Delivered!"
Navigate to / -> Leave one or more required fields blank -> Submit the contact form -> See validation feedback

routes.description: Main portfolio single page containing all sections

features.name: Submit Contact Form
features.description: Send a message to the portfolio owner using Web3Forms
user_interactions: Click Send Message button to submit
See success message "✓ Message Delivered!" on successful submission

features.name: View Projects
user_interactions: Hover over project cards for 3D tilt effect
